description: A user reports they can no longer access their streaming account and suspect it has been taken over by someone else.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the account details and review the recent login and profile change history.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds a recent login from an unrecognized IP address, followed by an email and password change.

nodes.task_description: Verify the user's identity using personal information and past billing details.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the person reporting the issue is the legitimate owner.

nodes.task_description: Revert the fraudulent email and password changes and secure the account.

expected_outcome.value: Agent restores the original account details and forces a password reset for the legitimate user.
